FGO-NP.title: NP
FGO-NP.description: Noble Phantasm gauge. At 100%+, you can use your Noble Phantasm.
FGO-STAR.title: Critical Stars
FGO-STAR.description: At 10+ stars, your next attack deals double damage and consumes 10 stars.
FGO-NP_DAMAGE.title: NP Damage
FGO-NP_DAMAGE.description: Increases NP attack damage by this percentage.
FGO-CRITICAL_DAMAGE.title: Critical Damage
FGO-CRITICAL_DAMAGE.description: Increases critical hit damage by this percentage.
FGO-EVIL_CURSE.title: Evil Curse
FGO-EVIL_CURSE.description: At the start of turn, lose HP equal to curse stacks.
